nasb.text: The chariots of God are myriads, thousands upon thousands; The Lord is among them as at Sinai, in holiness.

esv.text: The chariots of God are twice ten thousand, thousands upon thousands; the Lord is among them; Sinai is now in the sanctuary.

cnv.text: 神的車馬千千萬萬； 主從西奈山來到他的聖所中。

ccb.text: 上帝带着千千万万的战车从西奈山来到祂的圣所。

csbs.text: 神的战车千千万万， 主就在其中，从西奈山进入圣所。
